training.badge: Certified First Aid Instructor & Ambulance Service
training.title: Professional expertise for corporate safety and event security
training.text: As a certified first aid instructor and experienced paramedic, I offer you far more than just medical presence. I combine well-founded knowledge transfer with years of operational experience in emergency rescue to raise the safety level in your company or at your event to an expert level.
training.area1: Corporate safety: Training and consulting for companies and institutions.
training.area2: Event management: Security for corporate events, sports and cultural events.
training.area3: B2B support: Freelance support for rescue services, schools and event agencies.
training.ctaBadge: Fast response & project-based on a fee basis
training.sidebarTitle: Training, prevention & ambulance service – compact & practical
training.sidebarSubtitle: Click on an area to see details.
training.item1Title: Certified First Aid Instructor & Ambulance Service
training.item1Intro: Professional safety through proven knowledge transfer and operational expertise from emergency rescue.
training.item1Detail1: In-house training: First aid & emergency training directly at your location
training.item1Detail2: Expert knowledge for corporate emergency structures & procedures
training.item1Detail3: Prevention focus: Awareness of medical risks
training.item2Intro: Strengthen your organization with practical training, consulting and prevention coaching.
training.item2Detail1: In-house training: practical & with realistic scenarios
training.item2Detail2: Technical consulting: Creation & optimization of your safety concepts
training.item2Detail3: Prevention coaching: Sensitize employees & anchor sustainably
training.item3Title: Operational ambulance service on a fee basis
training.item3Intro: Professional medical security for your projects – confident, documented and according to current standards.
training.item3Detail1: Event security: First aid at corporate events, sports & public events
training.item3Detail2: Crisis-proof action: over 6 years of experience in active emergency rescue
training.item3Detail3: Legally secure accompaniment: Complete documentation and compliance with medical standards
training.footerTitle: Rely on safety from a professional.
training.footerText: I will be happy to create a customized offer for your training projects or the medical security of your next event.

aboutPage.headline: Kasem Alzuabi – Your partner for safety and everyday support
aboutPage.subheadline: Alltagshelfer Plus Herz – Your partner for safety and everyday support
aboutPage.intro1: My name is Kasem Alzuabi. I am 30 years old and combine my experience from emergency rescue with a genuine passion for supporting people.
aboutPage.intro2: Whether as a paramedic at an event or as a companion in your daily life: I am here for you when professionalism and a cool head are required – always combined with warmth and reliability.
aboutPage.medical1Text: Over 6 years of experience in active emergency rescue guaranteeing the highest level of composure in critical situations.
aboutPage.medical2Text: Professional authority in knowledge transfer and implementation of corporate emergency structures.
aboutPage.medical3Text: In-depth expertise in over-the-counter medications for qualified health prevention advice.
aboutPage.pedagogy1Text: Certified qualification in group dynamics and conflict management for responsible companionship at eye level.
aboutPage.pedagogy2Text: Professional support to promote quality of life while adhering to the highest quality standards.
aboutPage.strategyText: Commercial foundation: a guarantee for structured project execution, transparent fee arrangements and absolute administrative integrity.
aboutPage.promiseText: I do not offer standard solutions, but expertise tailored to your needs. Whether as a medical shield for your event or as a trainer for your team – I stand for quality, experience and responsibility.

home.headline: Alltagshelfer Plus Herz
home.welcome: Feel safe, supported, and independent in your own home. At Alltagshelfer Plus Herz, we offer personalized and caring support for your daily life. Whether it is help in the household, support with errands, or simply a listening ear – we are here for you. Discreet, reliable, and with heart.

personalized.title: Individual care
personalized.text: Perfectly tailored to your needs and wishes.

quality.title: Better quality of life
quality.text: Relief for you and your family.

safe.title: Daily safety
safe.text: Reliable support with clear processes and fixed contacts.

personal.title: Human closeness
personal.text: Empathetic companionship with time for real conversations.

relief.title: Noticeable relief
relief.text: More peace for relatives and more independence for clients.

steps.title: How to get started
steps.first: Reach out and get a no-obligation consultation
steps.second: Plan your support individually with us
steps.third: Receive reliable care from a fixed contact person

finalCta.title: We support you reliably and with heart.
finalCta.text: Let us clarify your needs in a short conversation.

about.headline: Serving you with heart and dedication
about.text: Alltagshelfer Plus Herz was founded with one clear goal: we want people to live at home for as long and as happily as possible. Our team consists of dedicated people who not only provide practical help, but also take time for a friendly conversation. We are not just a service provider, but real companions in your daily life.

services.headline: How we support you in daily life
services.intro: We adapt our services flexibly to your life situation.

daily.title: Daily assistance
daily.text: Support with getting up, going to bed, choosing clothes, and structuring the daily routine.

household.title: Household & shopping
household.text: Shopping together, running errands, light cleaning tasks, and laundry care.

leisure.title: Leisure & companionship
leisure.text: Support for walks, cooking together, games, reading aloud, or simply listening.

organization.title: Organization & appointments
organization.text: Support for doctor visits or authorities, help with pet care or plant care.

aftercare.title: Hospital aftercare
aftercare.text: Reliable support in the first period after a hospital stay.

pricing.headline: Transparent costs & billing with care insurance
pricing.text: Good care must be affordable. If you have a recognized care level (1 to 5), our services can usually be billed directly via the relief amount (§ 45b SGB XI) or respite care through the care insurance funds.

first.title: Free initial consultation
first.text: We get to know each other and determine your needs.

billing.title: Billing
billing.text: We support you with applications and, on request, bill directly with the insurance fund.

career.headline: Become part of our team!
career.text: You have a big heart, are reliable, and enjoy working with people? Then we are looking for you as a daily companion.

benefits.flexible: Flexible working hours (part-time, full-time, or mini-job)

career.success: Thank you! Your application has been submitted.

faq.headline: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: After our initial consultation, we can usually start support within a few days.
faq.a2: No, continuity is important to us. You will be assigned a fixed contact person to build a real relationship of trust.

contact.headline: We are here for you
contact.success: Thank you! Your message has been sent.

legalPage.vatIdText: VAT identification number according to § 27 a German VAT Act:
legalPage.privacyIntro: The protection of your personal data is important to us. Below we inform you about what data we collect on this website and how we process it.
legalPage.section2Title: 2. Collection and storage of personal data
legalPage.section2Text: We only process personal data to the extent necessary to provide a functional website and our content and services.
legalPage.section3Text: If you send us inquiries via the form, your details from the form will be stored with us for the purpose of processing the inquiry and for follow-up questions.
legalPage.section4Text: The processing of your data is based on Art. 6 para. 1 lit. a, b and f GDPR.
legalPage.section5Text: You have the right to information, correction, deletion, restriction of processing and data portability. You can also object to processing and revoke consent at any time.
legalPage.section6Text: You have the right to complain to a data protection supervisory authority about the processing of your personal data by us.
legalPage.section7Title: 7. Currency and changes to this privacy policy
legalPage.section7Text: This privacy policy is currently dated: [Date]. We reserve the right to adjust it as needed.
